## CheatReader v0.1.27

### Fixes
- Fixed page navigation skipping unread text after the reader window is resized to a narrower width (#21).
- Applied the same layout-aware behavior to Page Down, Page Up, custom page shortcuts, and automatic page turning.

### Root cause
- Multi-line reading wraps source paragraphs into visual lines based on the current window width. Page navigation advanced several visual lines in one frame, but the wrapping cache could not refresh when that movement crossed into another source paragraph. After a resize, the remaining steps therefore reused stale layout data and could jump past wrapped text that had not been displayed.
- Page navigation now yields to layout between visual-line steps, so every step uses wrapping information calculated for the current viewport and paragraph.

### Known issue
- Ubuntu 20.04 startup failure reported in #22 is still under investigation. Version 0.1.24 introduced the tray/AppIndicator integration, but startup and installation logs are required before the cause can be confirmed.
